name: rundrill-strategic-management
description: Strategic-management assistant for business owners — runs the whole 16-step strategy workflow for you, one step at a time, so you never juggle prompts or lose the thread. Collects your company context, then walks diagnostics → market & foresight research → business model → strategy map → KPI/OKR → Hoshin X-matrix → initiative plan → management rhythm, producing one verified artifact per step, inside your AI agent.
